action.reasoning: Observation: the restored GPS-only heuristic recovered local dense proxies close to the earlier best (10-episode safe_follow_steps 15.2 vs prior best eval 16.9), and the pipeline is stable end-to-end. Analysis: local metrics are still far from success, but repeated alternative controllers have been worse; the highest-value next step is to measure this restored controller on the real 50-episode eval before spending more iterations on speculative tuning. Decision: submit the current baseline checkpoint now.
